message:
feat(dashboard): add sparklines to preview panel

Add real-time mini Chart.js sparklines for CPU and memory usage in the
VM preview panel. The sparklines update via WebSocket metrics events
and show the last 20 data points. Includes proper cleanup when the
preview panel content is replaced.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
